div.head: The Secretary of State to the President’s Personal Representative in Honduras (Welles)
div.p: 12. Your 14, April 28, 2 p.m. Department approves of steps taken by you and of the policy indicated. You are authorized to state that this Government will lend its moral support to the Provisional Government of General Tosta constituted in accordance with the agreement quoted in your telegram. The Department takes this opportunity to commend you for bringing about a satisfactory solution of the Honduran difficulties.
